name: Generic Invoice
description: Generic invoice or receipt. Detects invoice numbers, dates (multiple formats), VAT IDs, plus names, addresses, IBAN, emails. Amounts are kept visible by default (most users WANT to share the totals) — toggle Amounts on manually if you also want to hide them.

patterns.name: Invoice number
patterns.description: Invoice number with common prefixes (INV, INVOICE, N°, #, etc.)

patterns.name: EU VAT Number
patterns.description: EU VAT number — 2-letter country code + 8 to 12 digits

patterns.name: Date (any common format)
patterns.description: Dates in DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, DD.MM.YYYY, DD-MM-YY etc.
